code:
stateDiagram-v2

    state ForkState <<fork>>
    state JoinState <<join>>

    GUIProcess: Process for displaying
 GUI is started
    GUIInit: GUI initializes data interface
 and components
    GUI: GUI is opened and shows
 list of stocks
    ReadData: Data interface reads
 relevant pickle file
    StockHandled: The data for the stock
 has been updated
    FindStock: Find stock with mising data
    DataGathererProcess: Process for gathering
 data is started
    WriteData: Data is written to
 pickle file
    DataGatherer: DataGatherer scrapes
 webpages
    GatherData: Stock data is gathered

    [*] --> ForkState: Program is started
    ForkState --> GUIProcess
    ForkState --> DataGathererProcess
    GUIProcess --> JoinState
    DataGathererProcess --> GatherData
    GatherData --> WriteData
    WriteData --> JoinState
    JoinState --> GUIInit: Data exists in file
    GUIInit --> ReadData: GUI requests data
    ReadData --> GUI: Data interface returns data
    GUI --> UpdateData: Every 500ms
    GUI --> RefreshData: User requests data
 to be updated
    GUI --> FilterData: User creates a filter
    GUI --> SortData: User requests data
 to be sorted
    GUI --> [*]: User closes GUI
    StockHandled --> GUI: Tell the GUI that new
 data is available
    RefreshButton --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data
    Filter --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data
    Sort --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data

    state RefreshData {
        RefreshButton: Data interface reads
 relevant picke file
        [*] --> RefreshButton
    }

    state SortData {
        Sort: Data interface sorts the
 currently displayed data
        [*] --> Sort: Send column and sort direction
 to data interface
    }

    state FilterData {
        Filter: Data interface filters the
 currently displayed data
        [*] --> Filter: Send filter type to
 data interface
    }

    state UpdateData {
        [*] --> FindStock
        FindStock --> [*]: No stock found
        FindStock --> DataGatherer: Send stock to data
 gathering process
        DataGatherer --> StockHandled
    }
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个股票数据监控系统的状态流程。程序启动后应该分成两条线：一条负责GUI显示，另一条负责后台数据采集。
明白了，ForkState作为分叉点。那GUIProcess和DataGathererProcess完成后需要汇合吗？还是各自独立运行？
需要汇合。DataGathererProcess要先完成GatherData和WriteData，GUIProcess完成后，两者在JoinState汇合，才能进入GUI初始化。
好的，我添加了JoinState。GUIInit之后是ReadData，然后进入主GUI状态。GUI需要支持哪些用户操作？
GUI要支持四种交互：定时自动更新、手动刷新、筛选和排序。另外还需要一个后台机制来检测缺失数据并触发采集。
UpdateData是每500ms自动触发的对吧？那它内部怎么工作——直接更新GUI还是走数据接口？
UpdateData内部先FindStock查找缺失数据的股票，如果找到就发送给DataGatherer去爬取，完成后通过StockHandled通知GUI。没找到就直接结束这次更新。
我把UpdateData做成了复合状态。那RefreshData、FilterData和SortData也需要展开吗？它们似乎都是用户触发的。
对，这三个都做成复合状态。RefreshData里面是RefreshButton触发读取pickle文件；SortData发送列名和方向给数据接口；FilterData发送筛选类型。最后都返回数据给GUI。
等等，我发现StockHandled到GUI的连线之前没画，还有RefreshButton、Filter、Sort这三个返回数据给GUI的关系也需要补上。
没错，StockHandled要告诉GUI新数据可用，那三个操作的结果也要返回给GUI更新显示。另外GUI关闭时要能正常结束到终止状态。
完成。我检查了所有路径：程序启动分叉、双进程汇合、GUI初始化、四种交互模式，以及用户关闭的终止状态。DataGatherer的网页爬取和WriteData写入pickle也都连好了。
